General.Name: Atland S.A.
General.Description: Fonciere Atland operates as a real estate investment trust. It invests in offices, retail outlets, warehouses, or light industrial premises. It also provides real estate sale-leaseback services, and construction and turnkey rental development services to business customers. The company is based in Paris, France.

4.Title: Chief Technology Officer & Chief Information Officer
